calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-13-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sara Lerschen.
Petitioner Sandy Tuyet La present in pro per for the minor, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of the MINOR'S name to : Michele Truong.
Decree signed in open court.
